scripts.build: tsx scripts/check-production-env.ts && tsx scripts/check-no-synthetic-imports.ts && tsx scripts/copy-data-to-public.ts && tsx scripts/build-overview-insights.ts && tsx scripts/build-overview-drilldowns.ts && tsx scripts/build-overview-snapshot.ts && tsx scripts/check-deploy-readiness.ts && node scripts/next-build-retry.mjs
scripts.preview: tsx scripts/copy-data-to-public.ts && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run build:opennext && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy && tsx scripts/verify-production-deploy.ts
scripts.upload: tsx scripts/copy-data-to-public.ts && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
scripts.test: tsx scripts/check-no-synthetic-imports.ts && tsx --test src/lib/finding-copy.test.ts src/lib/finding-grouping.test.ts src/lib/findings-shared.test.ts src/lib/season-scope.test.ts src/lib/slate-hero-links.test.ts src/lib/nfl/data-source.test.ts src/lib/nfl/super-bowl-officiating.test.ts scripts/nfl/lib/espn-season.test.ts scripts/nfl/lib/ref-analytics.test.ts src/lib/nba-team-season-records.test.ts src/lib/bbr-ref-team-records.test.ts src/lib/scoring-metrics.test.ts src/lib/nba-strength-of-schedule.test.ts src/lib/ref-number.test.ts src/lib/stats-query/stats-query.test.ts src/lib/ref-team-matrix.test.ts src/lib/stats-utils.test.ts src/lib/team-ats.test.ts src/lib/ref-market-expectation.test.ts src/lib/impact-calculator.test.ts src/lib/whistle-disposition.test.ts src/lib/worker-isolate-store.test.ts src/lib/json-asset-guards.test.ts src/lib/edge-fetch.test.ts src/lib/ref-stats-preload.test.ts src/lib/insights-routes.test.ts src/lib/ref-stats-bundled.test.ts src/lib/ref-stats-production.test.ts src/lib/deploy-readiness.test.ts src/lib/soccer-card-metrics.test.ts scripts/lib/volume-regression.test.ts scripts/lib/insight-drilldown-builder.test.ts scripts/ingest/parse-ref-index.test.ts scripts/ingest/ncaa-roster-ingest.test.ts scripts/cfb/lib/contract.test.ts src/lib/ncaa-analytics.test.ts src/config/leagueConfig.test.ts src/lib/site-link-health.test.ts src/lib/user-language.test.ts src/lib/provenance.test.ts src/lib/friction-matrix.test.ts src/lib/insights/generator.test.ts
scripts.build-nfl-penalty-events: tsx -e "import { loadNflversePenaltyEventIndex } from './scripts/nfl/lib/nflverse-penalty-events.ts'; await loadNflversePenaltyEventIndex('./data/nfl', { minYear: 2000, maxYear: 2024 });"
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:deploy && npm run honesty-audit && npm run validate-nfl
